name: codex-game-studio
description: A Codex plugin that turns game ideas, design docs, and playable builds into structured studio workflows.

interface.shortDescription: Plan, design, build, test, and ship indie games with Codex.
interface.longDescription: Codex Game Studio adapts the studio-style workflow popularized by Claude Code Game Studios into a compact Codex plugin. It provides focused skills for onboarding, concept design, production planning, architecture, QA, phase gates, and release readiness without depending on Claude Code slash commands, hooks, or subagents.
defaultPrompt: Find my current game development phase.
Check if my project can advance phases.
